dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes trend change detection via MA and momentum crosses. Used sma_5 per lookback_period parameter and rsi_14 as closest match to rsi_threshold of 50. Stop loss set to 0.5x ATR using atr_14 with 0.5 multiplier converted to percentage equivalent (0.5%). Entry is context-dependent (LONG on uptrend, SHORT on downtrend). Volume confirmation explicitly not required per signal. Exit triggers on trend reversal (MA cross in opposite direction).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes trend change detection via MA and momentum crosses. Used sma_5 per lookback_period parameter and rsi_14 as closest match to rsi_threshold of 50. Stop loss set to 0.5x ATR using atr_14 with 0.5 multiplier converted to percentage equivalent (0.5%). Entry is context-dependent (LONG on uptrend, SHORT on downtrend). Volume confirmation explicitly not required per signal. Exit triggers on trend reversal (MA cross in opposite direction).

source_rule_text: Enter trades at the moment of trend change, when the reward-to-risk ratio is most favorable, rather than focusing on perfect entry mechanics.
